items.title: More die of suspected Ebola as WHO warns that numbers will rise further
items.dek: In its latest update, the World Health Organization says there have now been 139 suspected deaths and 600 cases.
items.body: In its latest update, the World Health Organization says there have now been 139 suspected deaths and 600 cases.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Lithuania's leaders take shelter during drone air alert
items.dek: Flights were suspended and people were urged to take shelter after a suspected drone was detected near the Belarus border.
items.body: Flights were suspended and people were urged to take shelter after a suspected drone was detected near the Belarus border.
items.author: IriLine Desk
